summary_en: 4,400,300 ordinary shares (19.3% of issued capital) to be cancelled effective 2026-06-30. Post-cancellation issued shares: 18,398,174. Policy: hold treasury shares at ~5% of issued capital; excess shares cancelled.
title_en: Notice regarding cancellation of treasury shares
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-20, Sugimoto & Co.'s board of directors resolved to cancel 4,400,300 ordinary shares held in treasury under the authority of the Companies Act Article 178. The cancellation is scheduled to take effect 2026-06-30. Post-cancellation, issued shares will total 18,398,174. The company has adopted a policy of maintaining treasury shares at approximately 5% of issued capital; shares in excess of this threshold are cancelled as a rule.
